activities.title: Operate Explorer
activities.description: Render desktop file rows, metadata, selection controls, context menus, dialogs, and pop-out controls.

activities.title: Validate Requests
activities.description: Validate operation schemas, basenames, confirmations, conflicts, and stable error-code mapping before dispatch.

activities.title: Mutate Files
activities.description: Canonicalize paths, enforce project-boundary or explicit destination rules, write bytes, move entries, and manage recyclebin metadata.

activities.title: Reconcile Surfaces
activities.description: Refresh affected directories, update or close stale file tabs, show feedback, and reclaim source panes after pop-out.

arrows.label: Project boundary and writable destination rules
Refreshed explorer, reconciled tabs, and user feedback
